docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY HANSON, NORY AS TO DEFENDANT REED, DELVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-12-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NORY HANSON DOES NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF NORY HANSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DELVIN REED IS PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM JEFF WOHL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANSON, NORY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REED, DELVIN SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED NOV-27-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REED, DELVIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF NORY HANSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DELVIN REED IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2020 - JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK WILLIAM TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2020 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO FEB-24-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NORY HANSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DELVIN REED IS PRESENT. THIS CASE IS CONTINUED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF APPEAL IN CASE CSM 19-861339. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE:CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF: WILL NOT STIPULATE
